explanation: The code defines a program that constructs a graph of prime numbers and finds all possible cliques within that graph up to a specified maximum clique size (Q). It initializes a graph using an adjacency matrix and implements algorithms to check for cliques of varying sizes. Specifically, it begins by identifying cliques of size two and progressively builds larger cliques by evaluating connectivity between vertices. Memory management is also handled throughout to ensure that dynamically allocated structures are appropriately freed after use.
name: 2010-05-22_klik
subject: klik
summary: This project identifies all cliques of size <= Q in a graph using an adjacency list representation, focusing on prime numbers as vertices.
